# Entity: PAR

Parent Entity

An entity with sub-entities.

**Version:** 1.0.0 | **Hash:** none | **Timestamp:** 2026-03-21T00:00:00Z

## Rules

### [PAR-001.0/D] IS the parent of all child entities.

## Sub-entities
